WordPress & Full-Stack Developer

Itee Rajpurohit

WordPress Specialist • MERN Stack • CRM Expert

I'm a Full-Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience building scalable web solutions. I specialize in WordPress developmentfor fast, SEO-friendly websites, and MERN stack applicationsfor complex business needs.

My expertise includes seamless CRM integration(Salesforce, JobDiva), responsive design that works perfectly on all devices, and performance optimization that keeps your users engaged and Google happy.

Available for freelance projects — from business websites to complex web apps. One developer for projects at any scale.

Work Experience

Helping businesses scale with modern web solutions - from high-performance WordPress sites to custom MERN applications with seamless Salesforce & JobDiva integration.

IMS Group

Web Developer | Aug 2024 - Present

Developed scalable REST APIs using Node.js/Express, optimized MySQL queries (30% improvement), integrated Salesforce & Jobscience CRM, and implemented JWT authentication.

IT Spark Technology

Web Developer | Apr 2023 - Aug 2024

Built backend modules with Node.js/Express, developed RESTful APIs with validation, designed MySQL schemas, and collaborated with frontend teams for seamless integration.
